name: Corn Tortillas
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix 2 cups of masa harina with 1 1/2 cups of pureed salsa using a wooden spoon.
2. Form the dough into 12 balls.
3. Roll each ball of dough between two sheets of plastic wrap until flattened by hand or using a tortilla press.
4. Place the tortilla on a very hot, greased griddle or skillet.
5. Cook for 30 seconds on each side. The edges will brown and lift when ready to turn over.
6. If the dough is too dry, add more liquid; if it's too wet, add more masa harina. Adjust the amount of added ingredient to match the recipe requirements.
7. Tortillas can be frozen or stored in the refrigerator for later use.
8. This recipe makes 12 tortillas.
